languages.text: Несколько позеленевших проколов едва заметны в области шеи и живота.

languages.text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: Im Hals- und Bauchbereich befinden sich mehrere kaum sichtbare grünliche Einstiche.
languages.original_text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: Plusieurs piqûres verdâtres sont à peine visibles au niveau du cou et de l'estomac.
languages.original_text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: 在颈部和腹部，几乎看不到几处绿色的穿孔。
languages.original_text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: Hay varios pinchazos verdosos apenas visibles en las zonas del cuello y el estómago.
languages.original_text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: 首と腹の部分にかろうじて見える程度の緑色の刺し傷がいくつかある。
languages.original_text: There are several greenish punctures barely visible in the neck and stomach areas.

languages.text: Boyun ve karın bölgelerinde zorlukla görülebilen birkaç yeşilimsi delik vardır.
